grant_title: Odessa F. Kahrs and Henry D. Kahrs Trust for Charitable Purposes
geographic_restrictions: Southern New Jersey with preference given to Atlantic County. Eligible counties: Atlantic, Burlington, Camden, Cape May, Cumberland, Gloucester, or Salem.
project_area: Arts, culture, and humanities; Education; Environment/animals; Health; Human services; Public/society benefit; Religion
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond 501(c)(3) status and geographic location.
eligibility_summary: Qualified 501(c)(3) organizations located in southern New Jersey (Atlantic, Burlington, Camden, Cape May, Cumberland, Gloucester, or Salem counties) supporting charitable, religious, scientific, literary, or educational purposes. Preference given to organizations in Atlantic County.
